description: Alzahra University is a public women's university in Tehran, Iran. Founded in 1964, it is one of the few single-sex universities in the country. [Zahra Rahnavard](/people/zahra-rahnavard) served as its chancellor from 1998 to 2006, becoming the first woman to head a university in post-revolution Iran.
editorial_notes: Named after Fatimah al-Zahra, daughter of the Prophet Muhammad.
